changeSet.author: samuelfangjw
changeSet.sql: UPDATE feedback_questions SET show_responses_to = ( SELECT jsonb_agg( CASE v::text WHEN '"RECEIVER"' THEN '"RECIPIENT"'::jsonb WHEN '"OWN_TEAM_MEMBERS"' THEN '"GIVER_TEAM_MEMBERS"'::jsonb WHEN '"RECEIVER_TEAM_MEMBERS"' THEN '"RECIPIENT_TEAM_MEMBERS"'::jsonb ELSE v END )::text FROM jsonb_array_elements(show_responses_to::jsonb) v ) WHERE show_responses_to IS NOT NULL AND show_responses_to != '[]';

UPDATE feedback_questions SET show_giver_name_to = ( SELECT jsonb_agg( CASE v::text WHEN '"RECEIVER"' THEN '"RECIPIENT"'::jsonb WHEN '"OWN_TEAM_MEMBERS"' THEN '"GIVER_TEAM_MEMBERS"'::jsonb WHEN '"RECEIVER_TEAM_MEMBERS"' THEN '"RECIPIENT_TEAM_MEMBERS"'::jsonb ELSE v END )::text FROM jsonb_array_elements(show_giver_name_to::jsonb) v ) WHERE show_giver_name_to IS NOT NULL AND show_giver_name_to != '[]';

UPDATE feedback_questions SET show_recipient_name_to = ( SELECT jsonb_agg( CASE v::text WHEN '"RECEIVER"' THEN '"RECIPIENT"'::jsonb WHEN '"OWN_TEAM_MEMBERS"' THEN '"GIVER_TEAM_MEMBERS"'::jsonb WHEN '"RECEIVER_TEAM_MEMBERS"' THEN '"RECIPIENT_TEAM_MEMBERS"'::jsonb ELSE v END )::text FROM jsonb_array_elements(show_recipient_name_to::jsonb) v ) WHERE show_recipient_name_to IS NOT NULL AND show_recipient_name_to != '[]';

UPDATE response_instructor_comments SET show_comment_to = ( SELECT jsonb_agg( CASE v::text WHEN '"RECEIVER"' THEN '"RECIPIENT"'::jsonb WHEN '"OWN_TEAM_MEMBERS"' THEN '"GIVER_TEAM_MEMBERS"'::jsonb WHEN '"RECEIVER_TEAM_MEMBERS"' THEN '"RECIPIENT_TEAM_MEMBERS"'::jsonb ELSE v END )::text FROM jsonb_array_elements(show_comment_to::jsonb) v ) WHERE show_comment_to IS NOT NULL AND show_comment_to != '[]';

UPDATE response_instructor_comments SET show_giver_name_to = ( SELECT jsonb_agg( CASE v::text WHEN '"RECEIVER"' THEN '"RECIPIENT"'::jsonb WHEN '"OWN_TEAM_MEMBERS"' THEN '"GIVER_TEAM_MEMBERS"'::jsonb WHEN '"RECEIVER_TEAM_MEMBERS"' THEN '"RECIPIENT_TEAM_MEMBERS"'::jsonb ELSE v END )::text FROM jsonb_array_elements(show_giver_name_to::jsonb) v ) WHERE show_giver_name_to IS NOT NULL AND show_giver_name_to != '[]';
